title: The Struggle of a New IT Graduate

scenes.caption: Meet Leo. He just graduated with a degree in Information Technology. He is excited to start his career.
But the job market today is very crowded. Thousands of new graduates are looking for the exact same jobs.
Leo spends every single day sending out his resume to different companies.
Many 'entry-level' jobs require years of experience. It feels impossible to get a foot in the door.
He waits for days, but most companies do not even reply. The silence is very discouraging.
Soon, bills begin to pile up, and the pressure to find a job grows heavier.
Leo starts to doubt himself. He wonders if he chose the wrong path.
Still, he does not give up. He sits at his desk late into the night, practicing his coding.
The search is long and painful, but every rejection is just one step closer to an opportunity.
For many young IT graduates, the journey is hard, but persistence is their greatest tool.
